### 1. Anthropic extends Claude Fable 5 access window through July 19

### 2. Quadrupling code performance with a "useless" if

- Source: [purplesyringa.moe](https://purplesyringa.moe/blog/quadrupling-code-performance-with-a-useless-if/)
- Category: Tools Worth Testing
- Published: 2026-07-14T00:00:00.000Z
- Labels: reproducible, publish_private
- Product relevance: none

Source facts:
- Adding a logically redundant if-branch allowed the compiler to generate code that runs roughly 4x faster.

Builder/operator takeaway: Concrete, reproducible optimization technique worth knowing if ever profiling hot loops.

Uncertainty: Applicability depends heavily on language/compiler; may not transfer to typical Node/TS workloads.

### 3. sqlite-utils 4.1.1

- Source: [github.com](https://github.com/simonw/sqlite-utils/releases/tag/4.1.1)
- Category: Tools Worth Testing
- Published: 2026-07-14T00:00:00.000Z
- Labels: reproducible, publish_private
- Product relevance: none

Source facts:
- sqlite-utils 4.1.1 fixes a bug where table.transform() could silently delete or modify rows referenced by foreign keys during a transaction.

Builder/operator takeaway: Real bug fix that prevents a silent-data-loss failure mode for foreign-key-referenced tables.
